title: Trips
description: Trip schedule for the current station branch
empty: No trips in the selected window
createTripDescription: One-off trip from a route template with stops and tariff matrix.
tripNumberHint: Trip numbers are defined in schedules; enter one here for manual creation.
pastDate: Trip date cannot be in the past
needsVehicle: Select a vehicle to open sales
needsStops: Route must have at least two stops
detailDescription: View trip stops and update operational fields.
readOnlyHint: This trip is completed or cancelled and cannot be edited.
viewOnlyHint: You have view-only access to trips.
needsVehicleForOpen: Select a vehicle before opening sales
resourcesLocked: Vehicle cannot be changed after departure.
